title: Super RAG API — SR 3.4
description: Latest release. Assistant discovery, image retrieval, and reference chunks. Introduces /api/v3.4/ endpoints with assistant-bound collection resolution.

title: Super RAG API — SR 3.3
description: Data Processing API — document chunking and parsing utilities. Endpoints under /api/v3/actions/ for breaking references into structured chunks.

title: Super RAG API — SR 3.2
description: Enhanced chat API with explicit collection management. Client must pass collection_ids in each request. Endpoints under /api/v3.2/.

title: Super RAG API — SR 3.0
description: Full Super RAG API — authentication, chat, collections, and document management. 39 endpoints covering the complete /api/v3/ surface.
